info.description: Paadi backend — auth, pots, payments, settlements
info.title: Paadi API

get.description: Returns the caller's registered webhook endpoints. Signing secrets are never included in this response.

post.description: Registers a URL to receive signed event deliveries. The signing secret is generated server-side and returned once in this response.

delete.description: Soft-disables a webhook endpoint the caller owns. No further deliveries are attempted to it.

get.description: Returns recent delivery attempts for a webhook endpoint the caller owns, including status and retry state.
Returns the caller's API keys (prefix and metadata only — never the secret). Session auth only.

post.description: Creates a scoped API key acting as the caller. Session auth only — the plaintext key is returned once in this response and never again.

get.description: Returns the identity, mode and scopes of the API key making this call. API-key auth only — lets an integration discover what it is allowed to do.

delete.description: Revokes an API key the caller owns. Takes effect immediately. Session auth only.

get.description: Returns the ledger-derived statement for the caller over the requested date range.
Returns the caller's dedicated NUBAN and holder name, or 404 if not yet provisioned.

post.description: Provisions a dedicated NUBAN for the caller. Returns 201 when newly created, 200 when one already exists.

get.description: Returns the caller's reconciled wallet balance in kobo, derived from the double-entry ledger.

post.description: Settles a pot split directly from the wallet balance. Requires an idempotency-key header and the caller's PIN.

get.description: Returns the caller's ledger-derived wallet transactions for the requested window.

post.description: Moves value out of the wallet to a bank account. Requires an idempotency-key header; subject to KYC tier limits.

get.description: Returns the status and detail of a single withdrawal the caller initiated.
Returns the caller's pots, filterable and paginated by query.

post.description: Opens a new bill-split pot. Requires an idempotency-key header.

delete.description: Removes a draft pot the caller owns.

get.description: Returns full detail for a pot the caller owns or participates in.

patch.description: Edits mutable fields on a pot the caller owns.

post.description: Cancels an open pot and stops further contributions.

tags.description: Provision and manage a customer's dedicated NUBAN. Funds credited to a virtual account settle into the customer's reconciled wallet balance.
tags.name: virtual-accounts

tags.description: Read the reconciled wallet balance and move value out of it — withdraw to a bank account or pay a pot split directly from the wallet.
tags.name: wallet

tags.description: Ledger-derived transaction history and per-customer statements over the reconciled wallet.
tags.name: statements

tags.description: Admin queue for misdirected and unmatched payments — inspect exceptions held in suspense and resolve, refund, or hold them.
tags.name: reconciliation

tags.description: Register outbound webhook endpoints and receive signed, at-least-once event deliveries (verify each with the paadi-signature header) so a downstream app never has to poll.
tags.name: developer

tags.description: Create and manage bill-split pots — the reference consumer that integrates against the same virtual-account and wallet API any downstream developer would use.
tags.name: pots
